title: mdex finish output
description: Contract for mdex finish JSON output

contract_schema.description: Schema URL identifying this output contract.

contract_version.description: mdex contract version for this payload.

status.description: Execution status for the finish command. success indicates JSON payload contract completed.

noop.description: True when finish completes successfully without detected changes or apply operations.

task.description: Task label passed to mdex finish.

dry_run.description: True when finish runs in preview mode and does not apply enrich updates.

db.description: Resolved database info used for this finish invocation.

path.description: Resolved path of the SQLite index database.

changed_files.description: Changed files considered by impact. Empty array means no changed files were detected and this is still a successful run.

impact.description: Impact analysis result for changed files. Arrays may be empty on successful runs.

inputs.description: Normalized changed-file inputs used for impact scoring.

read_first.description: Non-task, non-decision nodes to read first.

related_tasks.description: Task nodes related to the current change set.

decision_records.description: Decision records related to the current change set.

stale_watch.description: Potentially stale nodes to review. Empty array is valid.

enrich_candidates.description: Ranked nodes considered for enrich. Empty array is valid and indicates no enrich target was found.

applied_enrichments.description: Enrich operation results that were actually applied. Usually empty when dry_run is true.

ran.description: True when scan actually ran. Can be false in dry-run mode or when scan fails.

recommended_next_actions.description: Action suggestions generated from impact and enrich analysis.

requires_manual_targeting.description: True when finish cannot safely choose a single enrich target and requires explicit mdex enrich <node-id>.

changedFileItem.description: One changed file row with its origin.

path.description: Changed file path in posix format.

source.description: Source of changed-file detection (for example git).

reason.description: Short rationale for why this node was selected.

score.description: Relative relevance score; higher means more relevant.

kind.description: primary means best auto-target candidate; secondary means review candidate.

reason.description: Why the node is a candidate.
